title: Knowledge notes
description: A db-backed, cited note the concierge/records/logistics agents write and read — visa rules, currency tips, a fact pulled from an uploaded document, a logistics caveat. Makes the trip smarter over time; distinct from a space's authoring-only knowledge/ dir.

tripId.description: the trip this note is about (null for a general note)

destinationId.description: the destination this note is about, if any (null = trip-wide)

topic.description: the note's subject, e.g. 'Schengen visa validity' or 'book Jerónimos tickets'

body.description: the note body, markdown, cited to its source

documentId.description: the source document, when sourceKind is 'document'
